## Your field / industry

What role and industry? (e.g., "ICU Nurse → Healthcare", "Family Law Attorney → Legal")

## What went wrong

What did the skill get wrong for your field? Wrong skills section structure? Bad verbs? Missed keywords?

## What the correct output should look like

If you know what it should produce — paste an example.

## Would you like to contribute a fix?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR with the field template
- [ ] No, just reporting
